name: Darwinbox HR Management Platform API
what_it_does: Darwinbox REST API for enterprise HRMS and HCM platform dominant in India and APAC. Enables AI agents to manage employee lifecycle from hire to retire, handle payroll processing and compliance for Indian regulations (PF, ESI, TDS), access performance management and goal tracking data, manage recruitment and talent acquisition workflows, handle attendance, leave, and workforce management, retrieve learning and development data, access compensation and benefits management, and integrate HR data with ERP and finance systems across Indian and APAC enterprises.
use_cases: Managing employee lifecycle and HR workflows from enterprise HR automation agents
Processing Indian payroll and statutory compliance from payroll automation agents
Accessing performance and talent data from people analytics agents
Integrating HR data with ERP systems from enterprise workforce automation agents
not_for: US/European businesses without APAC and India-specific payroll compliance focus
Small businesses without enterprise-scale workforce management needs
Non-APAC enterprises without Indian statutory compliance requirements
best_when: An Indian or APAC enterprise using Darwinbox wants AI agents to automate HR workflows, Indian payroll compliance, performance management, talent acquisition, and workforce analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee personal and payroll data is sensitive. Indian payroll includes Provident Fund (PF), Employee State Insurance (ESI), and TDS — statutory compliance errors are legally significant. APAC data privacy laws vary significantly by country. Employee performance data requires careful handling.

auth.notes: Darwinbox uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Organization-level credentials with HR, payroll, and talent scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for HR lifecycle events. Strong enterprise integration framework.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise HRMS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee annual pricing; modular (core HR, payroll, talent, etc.)
pricing.notes: Hyderabad, India. Founded 2015. Leading HRMS platform in India and Southeast Asia. Used by 2M+ employees across 700+ enterprises. Raised $72M Series C 2021 (Salesforce Ventures, Sequoia India). Clients include Flipkart, Swiggy, and Tokopedia. Expanding to Middle East and Africa. Competes with SAP SuccessFactors and Workday for APAC market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee payroll and performance data — Indian DPDP Act (2023) and PDPA compliance required
Indian statutory compliance: PF, ESI, TDS errors have legal consequences — verify before automating payroll
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
APAC multi-country deployment — data residency laws vary (India, Singapore, UAE, etc.)
Attendance and leave data tied to statutory entitlements — automation must respect local labor law
Fast-growing startup platform — API surface evolving; verify changelog for breaking changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee HR and payroll data. ISO27001, SOC2, PDPA, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region APAC. Indian statutory compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee HRMS data. ISO27001, SOC2, PDPA. OAuth2. APAC multi-region. Indian payroll statutory compliance.
